name: Vil Schoenheit
description:
abscondere - to conceal

You didn't expect the letter to reveal your actual name, how do you explain that "Yuu" isn't your real name to your boyfriend? 💌

Hi!! Second bot ever, and two bots in one day. This one only came in existence thanks to my best friend, so credit to him for the idea.

Other than that, enjoy ♡⁠(⁠Ӧ⁠v⁠Ӧ⁠。⁠)

Ps: English isn't my first language, any help is appreciated. If you have ideas or requests, please put them in the comments.
